words.definition: Having or showing sharp powers of judgement.
words.example: Her eyes were small and shrewd.
words.exampleText: Her eyes were small and shrewd.

words.definition: A strong desire to do or to achieve something, typically requiring determination and hard work.
words.example: But Tonino has ambition!
words.exampleText: But Tonino has ambition!

words.definition: A state of physical ease and freedom from pain or constraint; consolation or easing of grief or distress.
words.example: We must think how best to comfort him.
words.exampleText: We must think how best to comfort him.

words.definition: Smile radiantly or happily.
words.example: His baby face beamed.
words.exampleText: His baby face beamed.

words.definition: A long passage or area with rooms or compartments on one or both sides, typically a balcony or upper floor.
words.example: Someone in the gallery immediately shouted.
words.exampleText: Someone in the gallery immediately shouted.

words.definition: A container used for collecting and storing rainwater.
words.example: Somebody beat on a waterbutt with a stick.
words.exampleText: Somebody beat on a waterbutt with a stick.

words.definition: Soft, cushioned parts on the bottom of an animal's feet.
words.example: Paolo heard his firm pads trotting along the tiles.
words.exampleText: Paolo heard his firm pads trotting along the tiles.

words.definition: Jump or spring a long way, to a great height, or with great force.
words.example: Benvenuto made the difficult leap down.
words.exampleText: Benvenuto made the difficult leap down.

words.definition: Having or showing a tendency to be quickly irritated or provoked.
words.example: I was just going to get impatient.
words.exampleText: I was just going to get impatient.

words.definition: Covered with or having long, rough hair or wool.
words.example: He shot forward a shaggy black hind leg.
words.exampleText: He shot forward a shaggy black hind leg.

words.definition: Having a worn-down edge or point; not sharp.
words.example: His head was unusually wide and blunt.
words.exampleText: His head was unusually wide and blunt.

words.definition: Having a V-shaped cut or indentation.
words.example: Those ears notched like holly leaves.
words.exampleText: Those ears notched like holly leaves.

words.definition: A particular liking or fondness for something.
words.example: Result of his partiality for steak.
words.exampleText: Result of his partiality for steak.

words.definition: In a way that is deliberate and obviously meant to express a particular meaning or opinion.
words.example: Benvenuto and Aunt Gina always pointedly ignored one another.
words.exampleText: Benvenuto and Aunt Gina always pointedly ignored one another.

words.definition: Having a rough, irregular, or uneven surface or outline; worn out clothing.
words.example: Coat had worn to a ragged brown.
words.exampleText: Coat had worn to a ragged brown.

words.definition: Extremely beautiful, elaborate, or impressive.
words.example: Once been a magnificent black Persian.
words.exampleText: Once been a magnificent black Persian.

words.definition: A feeling of deep admiration for someone or something.
words.example: He had always treated Benvenuto with respect.
words.exampleText: He had always treated Benvenuto with respect.

words.definition: To cut or scrape with the nails or claws.
words.example: He scratched you if you tried to pick him up.
words.exampleText: He scratched you if you tried to pick him up.

words.definition: Put forward for consideration or action.
words.example: Which of you would you suggest?
words.exampleText: Which of you would you suggest?

words.definition: Relaxed and unconcerned.
words.example: He gave it a casual lick.
words.exampleText: He gave it a casual lick.

words.definition: In a smooth, flowing manner.
words.example: Leaping back to the window so fluidly and quickly.
words.exampleText: Leaping back to the window so fluidly and quickly.

words.definition: Having been calmed or comforted.
words.example: Tonino was already feeling soothed by the bustle.
words.exampleText: Tonino was already feeling soothed by the bustle.

words.definition: A small shelter for a guard or sentry.
words.example: Punch beat Judy to death at the top of his little painted sentry-box.
words.exampleText: Punch beat Judy to death at the top of his little painted sentry-box.

words.definition: Having or displaying a friendly and pleasant manner.
words.example: He was probably an amiable lunatic.
words.exampleText: He was probably an amiable lunatic.
